overall.description: Third-person gameplay from GTA Vice City Definitive Edition showing the protagonist running along Ocean Beach at sunset, passing NPC beachgoers and coastal hotels before entering the ocean water.

agents.ego_description: running across open beach toward the sunset

entered.detail: flat sandy beach stretching toward the horizon
calm ocean meeting the sky at sunset
pink and orange sunset sky with scattered cumulus clouds
wooden fence structures extending into the ocean water

segments.scene_description: The character runs across an open sandy beach toward the sunset. The ocean stretches ahead with wooden groynes visible in the distance, and the sky displays warm pink and orange hues.

events.description: city skyline with tall hotels comes into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: running along the beach with the city skyline visible on the left

notable_agents.action: beachgoer in red shorts walking along the shore

entered.detail: tall concrete resort buildings lining the coast
palm trees along the building frontage

segments.scene_description: As the character continues running, the Ocean Drive hotel skyline emerges on the left. Beachgoers are scattered along the sand, and palm trees line the building frontage while the sunset shifts to the right side of the frame.

agents.ego_description: running past the tall hotel buildings along the beach

segments.scene_description: The character runs closer to the tall resort hotels, which now dominate the left side of the frame at close range. The beach continues alongside with the ocean visible to the right.

events.description: character turns right to face the ocean and runs along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: running along the water's edge facing the ocean

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water with gentle waves lapping the shore

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the ocean and runs along the shoreline. The hotels disappear from view as the focus shifts to the water and the distant horizon with wooden groynes visible.

events.description: character enters the shallow ocean water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: running into the shallow ocean water

segments.scene_description: The character runs into the shallow ocean water, with waves splashing around. The sandy beach falls behind as the character moves deeper into the water facing the open ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vibrant beach that transitions from an open sandy expanse into the depths of the ocean. It begins with the character running toward a pink and orange sunset over the water, with wooden groynes marking the distant horizon. As the character continues forward, the scene expands to reveal the Ocean Drive hotel skyline and palm trees emerging on the left, while scattered beachgoers dot the sand. The camera then tracks closer to the towering resort hotels before turning away from the architecture to focus on the shoreline. Finally, the character leaves the sand behind and runs directly into the shallow ocean water, moving deeper into the waves as the beach recedes.
